case_title: MARLIN, HARRY vs. METROPOLIS BAKING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR APPOINTED SHERWOOD, PETER W. (083863), ARB-5 MAILED

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLIN, HARRY AS TO DEFENDANT METROPOLIS BAKING COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-03-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-04-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-15-1997

THE TRANSFER FEES IN THIS CASE WERE PAID BY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY ALAN THOMAS BUDGE. THIS CASE WAS RECEIVED FROM WALNUT CREEK-DANVILLE ON 12-31-96. IT WAS SUBMITTED TO DEPT 2 TWICE FOR CAUSE OF ACTION TO BE DETERMINED. IT WAS RETURNED FROM DEPT 2 THE SECOND TIME ON JANUARY 3, 1997. THE WALNUT CREEK-DANVILLE COURT NUMBER IS 62843. THE DATE THIS CASE WAS FILED IN MUNICIPAL COURT WAS JANUARY 3, 1997.
